1.project-description: A re-creation of my old roblox game "Merge Boxes!". It is now also an Incremental game as opposed to just a merge game, and it is also made in Love2D! The game is not finished yet, but I'd say it's pretty close!

2.project-description: My most popular game (1M+ visits across all of its places and peak 240 active players at once.), it is roleplay game based off Tumore's game named The Battle Bricks. The game is privated since I no longer wish to associate myself with them, their games, or their community. If you think this game doesn't exist, you can ask me for proof, and I will send it.

3.project-description: A not-very-popular merge game where you merge boxes.. yup, that's about it. I had a LOT of fun making this game, which is why it is getting a remake (Merge Boxes! 2D)

4.project-description: ..it's my website. You don't need to read about this, you're here!
